scenarios.scope: Scope 1: mlClient Race Fix + Typed Dependencies + Dead Code Removal
scenarios.title: Concurrent health checks are race-free
evidenceRefs: specs/023-engineering-quality/scopes.md Scope 1 DoD bullet for SCN-023-01
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD bullet: SCN-023-01 — mlClient() guarded by sync.Once is race-free under 50 concurrent health checks

scenarios.scope: Scope 1: mlClient Race Fix + Typed Dependencies + Dead Code Removal
scenarios.title: Typed Dependencies catch method signature changes at compile time
evidenceRefs: internal/api/health.go (Pipeliner, Searcher, DigestGenerator, WebUI, OAuthFlow, TelegramHealthChecker interface declarations)
specs/023-engineering-quality/scopes.md Scope 1 DoD bullet for SCN-023-02
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD bullet: SCN-023-02 — typed Dependencies (Pipeliner/Searcher/DigestGenerator/WebUI/OAuthFlow) make method signature changes fail at compile time

scenarios.scope: Scope 1: mlClient Race Fix + Typed Dependencies + Dead Code Removal
scenarios.title: Dead checkAuth method is removed
evidenceRefs: specs/023-engineering-quality/scopes.md Scope 1 DoD bullet for SCN-023-03
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD bullet: Dead checkAuth method removed from capture.go; grep -rn checkAuth internal/ returns zero results

scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 2 DoD bullet: SCN-023-04 — connector paths flow through config.Config (SST), zero raw os.Getenv for these keys in cmd/

scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 2 DoD bullet: All 4 intelligence handlers use writeJSON and writeError — zero manual json.NewEncoder calls

scenarios.scope: Scope 3: Health Log Exclusion + Connector sync_schedule From Config
scenarios.title: Health check requests excluded from request log
evidenceRefs: specs/023-engineering-quality/scopes.md Scope 3 DoD bullet for SCN-023-08
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 3 DoD bullet: /api/health and /ping requests excluded from structuredLogger output; non-health paths still logged

scenarios.scope: Scope 3: Health Log Exclusion + Connector sync_schedule From Config
scenarios.title: Connector sync interval from config
evidenceRefs: specs/023-engineering-quality/scopes.md Scope 3 DoD bullet for SCN-023-09
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 3 DoD bullet: connector supervisor reads sync_schedule / sync_interval from ConnectorConfig; parseSimplisticCronInterval handles */N and 0 */N patterns; 5m default fallback
